title: cyclosorus parasiticus subsp. manickirudorum
intro: Cyclosorus parasiticus subsp. manickirudorum is a subspecies of fern in the family Blechnaceae, commonly known as the Manickirudiram fern. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus parasiticus subsp. manickirudorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, manage fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including skin infections and respiratory problems.
